Package org.exist.storage.store

Contains the actual storage classes for the native XML storage backend.

See:
          Description

Interface Summary
BFile.PageInputStream  
BFileCallback  
 

Class Summary
BFile Data store for variable size values.
CollectionStore  
DOMFile This is the main storage for XML nodes.
DOMFileIterator Iterate through all nodes of a document in the DOM storage.
DOMTransaction DOMTransaction controls access to the DOM file This implements a wrapper around the code passed in method start().
FreeList Manages a list of pages containing unused sections.
FreeSpace Used to track the available amount of free space in a data page.
NodeIterator Class NodeIterator is used to iterate over nodes in the DOM storage.
StorageAddress Represents a (virtual) storage address in the paged file, consisting of page number, offset (tuple id) and flags.
 

Package org.exist.storage.store Description

Contains the actual storage classes for the native XML storage backend.

Class BFile is used for node and text indexes. DOMFile stores the persistent DOM.
